rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support

rulings.Case Title: NATASHA STRICKLAND LOWERY VS. CYNTHIA YATES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 25, 2020 line 6. PLAINTIFF NATASHA LOWERY Motion For Judgmnt On The Pleadings is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to defenses 6, 7, 8, 13, and 16. These defenses are sufficiently stated. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend to assert relevant facts supporting each elements as to each of the following defenses: 2, 5, 9, 17, and 18. Granted without leave to amend as to the remaining defenses subject to this motion. No authority is cited for the proposition that the purported defenses constitute an affirmative defense. =(501/CFH)
